3100710.name: Fellow 2: SWORD of DESTINY
3100710.description:
【Stroy】
Brothers looking for the legendary sword 'Sword of destiny'. They follow the sword's whereabouts and arrive at an ancient site.
The sudden collapse of the cave while searching for a sword inside the ruins led the two brothers to break up without confirming each other's life or death. Some time later, the main character, who escaped from the ruins, heads to the 'Tranada' continent, where he promised to meet again when he broke up with his brother in the past, over the small possibility of his brother being alive.
Fellow 2: Sword of Destiny begins with the arrival of the 'Tranada' continent. The main character goes on an adventure to find his brother there and is with three colleagues who have their own stories. The main characters face a huge fate as they go through adventures, battles, hardships, and hardships on their journey.

【Not lonely single play, multiplay-like single play】
Fellow 2: Sword of Destiny can organize parties of four and fight together.
The four characters use swordsmanship, archery, and magic to lead the battle in different styles. Players can change the characters they manipulate as needed during a battle in real time and play various roles in one battle. A character that doesn't manipulate becomes a strong companion with you to win battles in an AI state.

【Various monsters】
Various types of monsters are targeting the main characters in the field.
The monster you encounter may be a weak monster that is easy to attack, or you may encounter a huge and powerful boss monster. It's up to you to decide whether to attack or not.

【Dungeon walkthrough】
A variety of elaborately crafted dungeons are waiting for you. Solve the puzzles and tricks needed to attack the dungeon and head to the place where the boss monster is.
Attack the dungeon boss monster waiting for you deep inside the dungeon. Figure out the attack pattern of the boss monster and use the skill at the right time to defeat the boss.

【Multiplay with friends】
Join your friends on Fellow 2: Sword of Destiny. Be one of the four characters and proceed with the main scenario together. Also, join a giant dungeon and powerful boss raid that you can enter only in multiplayer to attack the dungeon with your friends or other players and get special loots. You can have another fun that you didn't feel in single play.
3100710.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语*, 韩语*, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
